obligations.rule: The domain must have at least two parts separated by a dot if `require_tld` is true.
obligations.why: Ensure the validator enforces the presence of a TLD when required.

obligations.rule: The domain must not contain spaces in the TLD.
obligations.why: Ensure the validator rejects invalid TLDs with spaces.

obligations.rule: The domain must not contain full-width characters.
obligations.why: Ensure the validator rejects domains with full-width characters.

obligations.rule: The domain must not start or end with a hyphen.
obligations.why: Ensure the validator rejects domains with invalid hyphen placement.

obligations.rule: The domain must not exceed 63 characters per label unless `ignore_max_length` is true.
obligations.why: Ensure the validator enforces label length limits unless explicitly ignored.

test_groups.title: Default options profile
test_groups.rationale: Tests the default behavior of the validator with no options provided.

test_groups.title: Option: require_tld = false
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when TLD requirement is disabled.

test_groups.title: Option: allow_underscores = true
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when underscores are allowed in domain labels.

test_groups.title: Option: allow_trailing_dot = true
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when trailing dots are allowed.

test_groups.title: Option: allow_numeric_tld = true
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when numeric TLDs are allowed.

test_groups.title: Option: ignore_max_length = true
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when label length limits are ignored.
